name: odoo
description: Odoo MCP server provider (multi-instance, no Odoo modules required)

timeout_seconds.description: HTTP timeout for Odoo JSON-RPC calls

allowed_models.description: Comma-separated allowlist of Odoo models (empty = all)

allow_unsafe_execute_kw.description: Enable generic odoo_execute_kw tool (use with care)

allowed_methods.description: Comma-separated allowlist of methods for odoo_execute_kw (empty = all when enabled)

max_smart_fields.description: Max fields returned when fields are omitted (smart selection)

validate_fields.description: Validate fields on create/update using fields_get
